zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes Edward Ward於1560年3月19日出生在英國盧特藍德布勞恩斯頓時，他的父親Sir Richard WARD20歲，母親Lucy Agnes BALLARD19歲。他於1585年1月與Judith Lukyn在英國素福爾可蕾托 福拉廷結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭被列為mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material)。他去世於1603年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年43歲，埋葬在英國倫敦可恩爾 聖 邁克爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johannes Edward Ward于1560年3月19日出生在英国盧特藍德布勞恩斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard WARD20岁，母亲Lucy Agnes BALLARD19岁。他于1585年1月与Judith Lukyn在英国素福爾可蕾托 福拉廷结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰被列为mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material)。他去世于1603年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年43岁，埋葬在英国倫敦可恩爾 聖 邁克爾。

nameMeanings.name: Ward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

variants.name: Warshawsky
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Ari, Hyman.

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from the city of Warsaw (Polish Warszawa), which became the capital of Poland at the end of the 16th century, after the destruction of Kraków by fire.
Americanized form of Polish Warszawski, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Wardman
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English wardman, either in the general sense ‘watchman, guard’ (compare Ward ) or in the administrative sense ‘representative of a ward within a borough’.

variants.name: Warde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.
Irish: variant of   Ward  .

nameMeanings.name: Johannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Eduardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Eideard

variants.name: Édouard
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Edvard

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes Edward Ward was born on 19 March 1560, in Braunston, Rutland, England, his father, Sir Richard WARD, was 20 and his mother, Lucy Agnes BALLARD, was 19. He married Judith Lukyn in January 1585, in Little Wratting, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. His occupation is listed as mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material) in England, United Kingdom. He died in 1603, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Cornhill St Michael, London, England.

fr.Leicester St Martin, Leicestershire, Eng: Leicester St Martin, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johannes Edward Ward est né le 19 mars 1560, à Braunston, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard WARD, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lucy Agnes BALLARD, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Judith Lukyn en janvier 1585, à Little Wratting, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material) à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1603, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Cornhill St Michael, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johannes Edward Ward am 19. März 1560 in Braunston, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard WARD 20 und seine Mutter Lucy Agnes BALLARD 19. Er hat im Januar 1585 in Little Wratting, Suffolk, England Judith Lukyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material) in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1603 im Alter von 43 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Cornhill St Michael, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Edward Ward è nato il il 19 marzo 1560 nel Braunston, Rutland, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard WARD, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Agnes BALLARD, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Judith Lukyn nel gennaio 1585, nel Little Wratting, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material) nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1603, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Cornhill St Michael, London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Johannes Edward Wardが1560年3月19日にイギリスルトランドブラウンストンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard WARDは20歳，母Lucy Agnes BALLARDは19歳であった。1585年1月にイギリススフォルクリットル ウラッティングでJudith Lukynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスでの職業はmercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material)と記録されている。彼は1603年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで43歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンコルンヒル スト ミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester St Martin, Leicestershire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 스트 마틴
ko.lifeSummary: Johannes Edward Ward(이)가 1560년 3월 19일 영국 루틀랜드 브라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard WARD(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Agnes BALLARD(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1585년 1월 영국 수폴크 리틀 래틴그에서 Judith Lukyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material)이었다. 그는 1603년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 코른힐 스트 믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johannes Edward Ward nasceu em 19 de março de 1560, em Braunston, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard WARD, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Agnes BALLARD, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Lukyn em janeiro de 1585, em Little Wratting, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material) em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1603, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Cornhill St Michael, London, Inglaterra.

ru.Leicester St Martin, Leicestershire, Eng: лисестир ст мартинь, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes Edward Ward родился 19 марта 1560 г. в местности браунстон, рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard WARD было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Agnes BALLARD, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Lukyn январь 1585 г. в местности литл раттинг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material) в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1603 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности корнилл ст мачаел, Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johannes Edward Ward nació el 19 de marzo de 1560, en Braunston, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard WARD, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lucy Agnes BALLARD, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Judith Lukyn en enero de 1585, en Little Wratting, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era mercer (dealer in textiles and fabrics, especially silks, velvets and other fine material) en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1603, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Cornhill St Michael, London, Inglaterra.
